title: cenchrus hordeoides
intro: Cenchrus hordeoides, also known as the Indian star grass or pennisetum, is a type of grass native to tropical Africa and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cenchrus hordeoides include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
